abilities.name: Delta Reserve
abilities.text: As long as Pidgeot has any Holon Energy cards attached to it, each player's Pokémon (excluding Pokémon that has δ on its card) can't use any Poké-Powers.

attacks.name: Rotating Claws
attacks.text: You may discard an Energy card attached to Pidgeot. If you do, search your discard pile for an Energy card (excluding the one you discarded) and attach it to Pidgeot.

tests.name: delta_reserve_blocks_non_delta_powers
tests.description: Test that Delta Reserve blocks Poke-Powers of non-delta Pokemon

tests.name: delta_reserve_allows_delta_powers
tests.description: Test that Delta Reserve allows delta Pokemon to use Poke-Powers

tests.name: delta_reserve_requires_holon_energy
tests.description: Test that Delta Reserve only activates with Holon Energy attached

tests.name: rotating_claws_energy_swap
tests.description: Test that Rotating Claws can swap Energy from discard
